dc_description: A close-up outdoor selfie of a cyclist standing beside a narrow rural road. The person is wearing a black bicycle helmet, a dark sleeveless top, and backpack straps; their face is obscured by a solid rectangular blur. Dry grass, bushes, and trees line the roadside under a clear blue sky. In the background, a triangular warning sign and a circular 30 speed-limit sign are visible near the edge of the road.
novel_visual_observations: The scene appears sunlit and dry, with strong warm light and arid vegetation suggesting a hot rural setting. A small dark spot is visible in the sky area near the upper center-right of the image.
rich_context: SP16b, Grezzano-Pian delle Rose, Nepi, Viterbo, Lazio, 00063, Italia
